title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
